title: Claude Just Dropped ULTRA CODE. (Everything You Need to Know in 5 min).
summary: Claude released Ultra Code, a feature that coordinates up to 100 parallel workers to decompose and execute tasks concurrently, then verify results. The feature combines extended thinking with dynamic workflows to enable team-like code generation and task execution at scale.
